query:
SELECT
                ci.product_id as "product_id!",
                ci.quantity as "quantity!",
                ci.unit_price_cents as "unit_price_cents!",
                p.available_stock as "available_stock!"
             FROM cart_items ci
             JOIN products p ON p.id = ci.product_id
             WHERE ci.cart_id = $1
             FOR UPDATE OF p
